title: PotionsPlus
description: Adding missing effect potions to Minecraft
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad7fc067bb6b0a802e077e7889c290ddd200ad6.png)

### 📖 About:
This mod adds the missing potions for effects that are in vanilla minecraft but do not have a potion variant

![Seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/dUbWdDF.png)

### 💸 Donating:
If you want to receive updates on this mod, become a patron.

If you would consider donating a bit of money that would be really helpful for making my mods, I spend a lot of time on them and would greatly appreciate if you would Donate some money. This can be done with a One time donation in the "About Project" tab, or by becoming a Patron.

by becoming a Patron you can get to use updates of the mod at least a week before the official release, special discord roles, and exclusive posts, and even more in the future!

Here is a link to the [Patreon Page](https://www.patreon.com/joppebijlsma).

![Seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/dUbWdDF.png)

### ✅ Potions added:
- absorption
- blindness
- darkness
- glowing
- haste
- health boost
- hunger
- levitation
- mining fatigue
- nausea
- unluck
- wither

![Seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/dUbWdDF.png)

### ❓ F.A.Q.
Can you update to Minecraft version ...?

I will update to new Minecraft versions once I feel like there is a stable release for the Minecraft version. I will be backporting this mod in the future to some earlier versions of the game.

![Seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/dUbWdDF.png)
